LanguageData.AH_RegisterAnimalsDesc: Register breeding pairs from this caravan at {0}.
LanguageData.AH_RegisterDesc: Select species to register. Two animals will be consumed per species as a breeding pair.
LanguageData.AH_NoAnimals: No animals registered at this settlement.
LanguageData.AH_NoAnimalsRegistered: No animals registered — animal production disabled
LanguageData.AH_BasicAnimalsEnabled: Basic farm animals available at all settlements
LanguageData.AH_BasicAnimalsEnabledDesc: When enabled, basic farm animals (Chicken, Cow, Pig, Sheep, Goat) are available at all settlements without needing to send breeding pairs.
